text:
Up To Date CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident’s COVID-19 vaccination is up to date. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2024
1030 O0390A_SPCH_THRPY_CD O0390A_SPCH_THRPY_CD O0390A Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology Services Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology Services for at least 15 minutes a day on one or more days in the last 7 days -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes effective
